case_title: BULLINGER, PAT vs. MICHAEL BROTHER'S BAKERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BULLINGER, PAT AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL BROTHER'S BAKERS, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BULLINGER, PAT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MICHAEL BROTHER'S BAKERS, INC. $11,107.63 PRINCIPAL, $439.53 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,627.16 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. A WRIT MAY ISSUE ON 04-JAN-94 UNLESS A MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT IS FILED.
